Modem Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x18
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only register reflecting modem control input states and changes since last read.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7] dcd r 0x0 DCD
[6] ri r 0x0 RI
[5] dsr r 0x0 DSR
[4] cts r 0x0 CTS
[3] ddcd r 0x0 DDCD
[2] teri r 0x0 TERI
[1] ddsr r 0x0 DDSR
[0] dcts r 0x0 DCTS

Field Descriptions

dcd - DCD

Data Carrier Detect. Complement of dcd_n input. 1=dcd_n asserted.

ri - RI

Ring Indicator. Complement of ri_n input. 1=ri_n asserted.

dsr - DSR

Data Set Ready. Complement of dsr_n input. 1=dsr_n asserted.

cts - CTS

Clear to Send. Complement of cts_n input. 1=cts_n asserted.

ddcd - DDCD

Delta Data Carrier Detect. dcd_n has changed since last MSR read.

teri - TERI

Trailing Edge Ring Indicator. ri_n transitioned active-to-inactive since last MSR read.

ddsr - DDSR

Delta Data Set Ready. dsr_n has changed since last MSR read.

dcts - DCTS

Delta Clear to Send. cts_n has changed since last MSR read.
